summary.en: Compute batches of dense f32 matrix products and return correct binary outputs as quickly as possible.
summary.zh: 批量计算稠密 f32 矩阵乘积，并尽快返回正确的二进制输出。

resource_profile.name: agentics-cpu-large
resource_profile.resource_description: Ubuntu 24.04 build environment with CPU-only execution.

official_prepare.reproducibility_notes: Official benchmark files are generated from a private seed/config overlay. Full-size generation uses a pinned NumPy install when the evaluator image does not already provide NumPy.

metrics.name: correctness
metrics.label: Correctness
metrics.metric_description: Fraction of invocations whose binary outputs passed tolerance checks.

metrics.name: total_wall_time_ms
metrics.label: Total Wall Time
metrics.metric_description: Sum of worker-measured wall time across all solution invocations.

metrics.name: wall_time_ms
metrics.label: Invocation Wall Time
metrics.metric_description: Worker-measured wall time for one solution invocation.

metrics.name: max_abs_error
metrics.label: Max Absolute Error
metrics.metric_description: Maximum absolute f32 output error observed by the evaluator.

metrics.name: failed_values
metrics.label: Failed Values
metrics.metric_description: Number of output values outside the declared tolerance.
